ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the content was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of the main actors */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (movie or TV show) */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., upcoming, released, in production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_genres" (
  "content_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the content-genre relationship */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the genre is the primary genre for the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_genres_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score representing the user's preference for the genre */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was set or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was viewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration the user watched the content */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score representing the relevance of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Brief reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_preferences" (
  "genre_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre preference */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "average_preference_score" REAL /* Average preference score for the genre across all users */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users who have preferences for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the trend */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score representing the popularity of the genre during the period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, review) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_interactions" (
  "genre_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., follow, favorite) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_interactions_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., theme, setting, mood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tags" (
  "user_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user tag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., interest, preference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
